description: The smallest document: one rule, nested AND/OR, two setOutput actions.
A rules set; priority controls evaluation order and which output wins the merge.
In / NotIn against a closed set (array values).
IsNull / IsNotNull, and coalesce to supply defaults for null fields.
AND / OR / NOT nested to arbitrary depth.
Output values computed from fact fields (multiply, subtract, concat).
Every arithmetic operator: add, subtract, multiply, divide, modulo, negate.
addToOutput (running total) and appendToOutput (collected list) across rules.
A decision table with hitPolicy: "first" — only the first matching row applies.
A decision table with hitPolicy: "collect" feeding accumulator outputs.
The custom operator, delegating a leaf to a function registered on the builder.
The pre-else way to write if / else: a rule and its negation (NOT) append different values.
The same if / else as 13, expressed DRY as a first decision table.
A condition whose left-hand side is a computed expression.
First-class else actions (one rule, both branches) and removeOutput to retract an earlier output.
enabled: false retires a rule without deleting it — it is skipped entirely.
Extensions.Functions' curated built-in custom predicates: IsEmail, EqualsIgnoreCase, DivisibleBy, IsPositive.
A decision table then cell is an expression, not just a constant.
